entries.source: Chat Edit: 'Yes, please all 3 fully integrated fully into the IDE from the ground up to ensure everything works, menu bar - load gguf model - add automatic model streaming incase its a large model and it doesnt sit and eat up memory when NOT in use / other wise just load it but create the same strategy even for the smaller models so nothing is just sitting in memory and NOT being used / could cause timeouts and possibly not keep it "warm/spun up"'
